scope: Functional sidebar menu between 01 Runtime and 03 Entrada plus safe project archive endpoint
features: Harness Engineering Studio button added as first sidebar action
Create project form calls existing POST /api/agent/projects with bootstrapProject=true

validation: POST archive smoke project: 200 ok, backup created
Final active project list has no ui-menu-smoke project left
Backend log final: no Traceback/500/SyntaxError/Exception matches
